cost_name: Backup/UPS Systems — Diesel Generator + Battery UPS — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: Industry norms for industrial plant backup power. Diesel generator sized for black-start and safety systems (not full production). UPS for DCS, SIS, and critical instrumentation per IEC 61511.

confidence.rationale: Standard industrial backup power cost data. Cost depends on black-start philosophy (full plant vs safety-only) and grid reliability at site.

primary_drivers: Safety system autonomy duration (UPS battery capacity)
exclusions: Full production backup power (not economically viable for electrolysis)
